chapter_title.en: What Garments Are Permissible for Prayer and What Garments Are Not

text: 753 - وَ سَأَلَهُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ عَبْدُ اَلرَّحْمَنِ بْنُ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ: عَنِ اَلرَّجُلِ يُجْنِبُ فِي ثَوْبٍ وَ لَيْسَ مَعَهُ غَيْرُهُ وَ لاَ يَقْدِرُ عَلَى غَسْلِهِ قَالَ «يُصَلِّي فِيهِ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.753 - He was asked by Abd al-Rahman ibn Abi 'Abdillah about a man who becomes ritually impure (junub) in a garment and has no other garment and is unable to wash it.
Imam (as) said: "He should pray in it."
